'''Huip''' was the innermost celestial body [[Orbit/Legends|orbiting]] the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Beheboth (star)|Beheboth]] in the [[Beheboth system/Legends|Beheboth system]],<ref name="Beheboth Part 1" /> a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located in the [[Sanbra sector/Legends|Sanbra sector]],<ref name="EAOC" /> one of the [[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EA Outer Rim" /> Alongside its outer neighbor [[Brenu]], Huip was classified as a sungrazer [[Planetoid/Legends|planetoid]] and had no [[Moon/Legends|moons]].<ref name="Beheboth Part 1" />

==Behind the scenes==
Huip was first mentioned in "Return to Prosperity," the first entry in the ''[[Planet Hoppers]]'' article series ''[[Beheboth: Blood and Water]]''. The article was written by [[Cory J. Herndon]] and published on [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s [[Wizards.com|website]] on [[June 3]], [[2004]].<ref name="Beheboth Part 1" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Beheboth system, and therefore Huip, in grid square O-17.<ref name="TEA" />
